name: Yoshi's Cafe Green Tea Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring milk to a boil.
2. Remove from heat and add green tea. Mix well.
3. In a separate bowl, beat egg yolks and sugar until they form a ribbon.
4. Combine egg mixture with milk, then strain into a saucepan.
5. Cook over medium-high heat until just before the mixture reaches a boil. Remove from heat and cool completely over ice water.
6. Beat heavy cream and half-and-half over ice water until frothy.
7. Pour into egg mixture and mix well.
8. Process in ice cream maker according to manufacturer's directions.
9. Freeze 2-3 hours before serving.
